infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Le Poulet needs your location to show your team on the map and help you hunt the chicken.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Le Poulet needs your location to show your team on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Le Poulet needs camera access to complete photo and video challenges.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Le Poulet needs microphone access to record video challenges.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Le Poulet tracks your location for the hunt.
